name: Groundwork
description: Contact intelligence plugin for Groundwork (linked-collector). Queries a local SQLite database of contacts collected from Gmail, Calendar, and Slack, and delivers post-run digests with notable new contacts and LinkedIn enrichment candidates.
author: groundwork

db_path.description: Absolute path to the Groundwork contacts.db SQLite database.

project_path.description: Absolute path to the Groundwork project directory (used to locate scripts).

notify_channel.description: Channel or contact to send post-run digests to (e.g. a Slack channel ID, WhatsApp number, or Discord channel ID). Leave empty to skip automatic push notifications.

min_score.description: Minimum interaction_score for a contact to appear in the digest. Contacts below this threshold are not named in push messages.

python_bin.description: Python interpreter to use for running Groundwork scripts.
